what_it_does: Documents the full downstream reach map of the mode system after the mode-dial join, tracing how the single MODE_REGISTRY[mode] source propagates through five arms (directive, verb-sets, governance routing, staged reply/swarm, activation/budget), listing what is wired versus declared, and identifying lost opportunities where the unified source has not yet been consumed.
observations: Built from a three-reader deep sweep and claims to be file:line-traced.
Presents one MODE_REGISTRY with 13 axes as the single source, with derived half-views (MODE_SPECS, PART_GRAIN, ACTIVATION_ALLOCATION, MODES, MODE_DIRECTIVES).
Five arms are mapped: prompt directive, governed verb sets, decide-for-me routing, grain/shape/stage/cast + swarm, and activation/budget.
Provides a table of eight modes with context resolution lens, reply style, swarm usage, verbs offered, and essence.
The swarm fires only for 'listening' and only on the voice path; typed chat is one-shot in every mode.
'consent' is declared but unwired; governance posture is global and mode-blind except for one hardcoded 'decide-for-me' branch.
'brain_config' is declared but reaches nothing; no code reads which brain a mode wants.
'activation' is built but undriven: no HTTP route or timer calls fire_activation/consolidate_rollup.
'vec://' is corrected as wired and live-used for R2 scoring; 'blob://' remains declared-only.
Identifies a non-loop seam: swarm run:// outputs do not feed back into R2's next-turn resolution.
Includes a 'lost-opportunity map' of eight specific gaps with file:line references.
standouts: The central thesis that the join unified the SOURCE but the REACH was never extended, and that gap is the drift.
The unified mode_registry() accessor has zero callers, making it the most precise statement of the drift.
Activation/budget is wired in code but has no driver.
Cognition is listening-on-voice-only; other modes and typed chat get no swarm.
Two axes (brain_config, consent) are declared but reach no downstream behavior.
concerns: Heavy interpretive claims rely on line references without inline code snippets, so the doc can drift from the code it cites.
The author notes a prior propagating-fact error about vec://, which raises epistemic caution about other claims.
Assertions like 'brain_config reaches nothing' and 'consent is unwired' are brittle and may become stale quickly.
Single long document may be hard to keep synchronized with a moving codebase.
notes: A file:line-traced architectural audit of the mode dial's downstream reach and its unwired declarations, arguing the source is unified but the reach is incomplete.
questions: What exact code snippets correspond to each cited file:line reference?
How is MODE_REGISTRY defined and populated at suite.py:1220?
Is this map generated by a tool or hand-written, and how is it kept in sync?
What is the intended owner or schedule for the lost-opportunity work?
How does the '3-reader deep sweep' differ from normal documentation generation?
purpose_vs_actual: It states it is a full reach map and drift audit of the mode system; the content matches that purpose, though it is interpretive rather than executable.
intention_signals: It tries to make the mode system's actual downstream wiring visible, correct under-reading, and flag where a unified source needs its reach extended rather than further source unification.
novelty: Treats the mode dial as a circuit with five arms and an explicit 'lost-opportunity' map, using a declared/wired/live taxonomy to separate what exists from what is consumed.
contribution: Provides a dense, line-traced conceptual map and gap inventory that a fused system could keep as a living audit of which mode-registry axes are wired versus merely declared.
summary_for_embedding: A file:line-traced reach map of the company's mode system describing how MODE_REGISTRY propagates to prompts, verb sets, governance routing, staged replies, and activation, plus a list of unwired declarations and lost opportunities.
intention_for_embedding: To audit and document the downstream wiring of the unified mode dial so the next pillar-work can extend reach rather than re-unify source.
